name: RefreshPlatformStats
description: Refreshes planner statistics for the sample and returns persisted table-level stats.

name: GetCustomer360
bodySql:
SELECT *
FROM customer_360
WHERE customer_id = @customerId;
SELECT order_id, ordered_date, order_status, channel, total_amount, line_count
FROM order_revenue_rollup
WHERE customer_id = @customerId
ORDER BY ordered_date DESC, order_id DESC;
SELECT ticket_id, category, priority, ticket_status, subject, assigned_agent, severity_score
FROM support_queue
WHERE customer_id = @customerId
ORDER BY severity_score DESC, ticket_id;
description: Returns the customer summary, order rollup, and current support queue rows for one account.

name: EscalateSupportTicket
bodySql:
UPDATE support_tickets
SET priority = @newPriority,
    status = @newStatus,
    assigned_agent_id = @assignedAgentId,
    last_updated_date = @changedDate
WHERE id = @ticketId;
INSERT INTO ticket_comments (ticket_id, author_name, comment_date, body)
VALUES (@ticketId, @changedBy, @changedDate, @note);
SELECT *
FROM support_queue
WHERE ticket_id = @ticketId;
SELECT id, entity_type, entity_id, event_type, event_date, actor_name, details
FROM platform_events
WHERE entity_type = 'ticket' AND entity_id = @ticketId
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.name: changedBy
parameters.description: Actor recorded in the comment trail.

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Internal note appended to the ticket.

description: Escalates a ticket, appends a note, and returns the refreshed queue row plus recent platform events.

name: ReceiveInventory
bodySql:
UPDATE inventory_positions
SET on_hand_qty = on_hand_qty + @quantity,
    last_received_date = @receivedDate
WHERE warehouse_id = @warehouseId AND product_id = @productId;
INSERT INTO platform_events (entity_type, entity_id, event_type, event_date, actor_name, details)
SELECT 'inventory_position', id, 'inventory_received', @receivedDate, 'warehouse', @referenceCode
FROM inventory_positions
WHERE warehouse_id = @warehouseId AND product_id = @productId;
SELECT *
FROM inventory_watch
WHERE warehouse_id = @warehouseId AND product_id = @productId;
description: Applies an inventory receipt and returns the refreshed warehouse-product position.
